characters.name: Carrie Roman
characters.description: Carrie RomanPortayed ByBetty GilpinBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationER DoctorColleaguesJackie Peyton(friend, colleague)ChildrenUnnamed infant (deceased)✝RelationshipsFitch Cooper(ex-lover, ex-colleague, father of child that died)Johanes Karlsen(ex-lover, affair)Physcial DescriptionGenderFemaleHair ColorBlondeEye ColorGreenDr. Carrie Romanis an emergency room doctor at All Saints Hospital. She makes her first appearance inSeason 5, is played by Betty Gilpin, and appears on the show for Seasons 5-7. Johanes Karlsen(ex-lover, affair) Carrie is a young self-absorbed doctor, who had recently graduated from Northwestern University and medical school before becoming a doctor at All Saints Hospital. But instead of advancing herself on merit, she rather slept her way through school, with multiple teachers and students. She was known to involve herself with married men. It is also likely that she was raised Catholic, but exited her faith, due to the constant chastisement from Nuns, which she develops an intense fear of in her adult life.

characters.name: Charlie Cruz
characters.description: Charlie CruzPortayed ByJake CannavaleBiographical InformationStatusDeceasedRelationshipsMike Cruz (Father)Jackie Peyton (Rehab Friend)Physcial DescriptionGenderMaleCharlie Cruz, portrayed by actor/musician Jake Cannavale, was a good friend ofJackie Peytonfrom rehab in Season 4, and is the son ofMike Cruz. Jackie Peyton (Rehab Friend) Charlie Cruz is a young, struggling drug addict with bright green hair. His fatherMike Cruzwas never really a good father figure, always paying him off, leaving Charlie in an easy position to buy more drugs. Charlie went to rehab a total of 5 times before his death but always relapsed. He died at the age of 18. Jackie often called Charlie in times of distress to lean on him, after his death she continued to call and leave voice messages, even though she knew he was dead. Mike listened to all the voicemails left on Charlie's phone. Jackie and Mike met and slept together, because of their newfound similarity; their love for Charlie.

characters.description: Eddie WalzerPortayed ByPaul SchulzeBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationPharmacist at All Saint Hospital,Drug DealerColleaguesFitch Cooper(close friend, ex-colleague)Gloria Akalitus(ex-boss, disliked)Carrie Roman(ex-colleague, acquaintance)Thor Lundgren(close friend, ex-colleague)Ike Prentiss(ex-colleague, disliked)Bernard Prince(ex-colleague, acquaintance)Kelly Slater(ex-colleague, disliked)Johanes Karlsen(enemy, owner of All Saints)Barry Wolfe(friend, lawyer)Kevin Peyton(ex-friend, enemy)RelationshipsJackie Peyton(lover, fiancé, best friend, ex-colleague)Eleanor O'Hara(ex-love interest, ex-colleague, friend)Antoinette (ex-lover, ex-friend)Physcial DescriptionGenderMaleEye ColorGreenEddie Walzeris a pharmacist at All Saints Hospital. He was in an on-again, off-again relationship withJackie Peyton, until they get engaged later in the seasons. He is portrayed by Paul Schulze. Gloria Akalitus(ex-boss, disliked)Carrie Roman(ex-colleague, acquaintance)Thor Lundgren(close friend, ex-colleague)Ike Prentiss(ex-colleague, disliked)Bernard Prince(ex-colleague, acquaintance)Kelly Slater(ex-colleague, disliked)Johanes Karlsen(enemy, owner of All Saints)Barry Wolfe(friend, lawyer)Kevin Peyton(ex-friend, enemy) Eleanor O'Hara(ex-love interest, ex-colleague, friend)Antoinette (ex-lover, ex-friend) Eddie is a nice guy who actively gives everything to others in the hope they'll love him back. Eddie is aware Jackie is using him for opiates, but is so in love with her he feeds her habit. Eddie will take the downfall for things for Jackie because of his intense love for her. Eddie is enamored with Jackie, he will do absolutely anything for her, completely unaware of how borderline narcissistic and selfish Jackie is. Eddie is excellent at hacking the system to get extra pills and coveri

characters.name: Frank Verelli
characters.description: Sergeant Frank Verelliis a New York Police Department cop who frequented All Saints Hospital with patients in custody. Frank was in a romantic relationship withJackie Peytonduring season 5. Frank was played by comedian Adam Ferrera. Frank begins a romantic relationship with Jackie at the end of season 4. Frank is divorced, he has two teenage boys that he had with his ex wife. Frank has a really great personality; friendly, funny, humourous and loving. Frank is an attractive man of Italian decent who looks really great in his police uniform. Frank represents everything good in the world to Jackie, he makes her accountable for things and makes her laugh. Frank begins to date Jackie and keeps her accountable. Mid season 5 he calls her out for lying to Kevin about how hard it was to get a night off. Frank tells her she needs to not lie or like to him, otherwise he is worried he will end up in the same place as where her and Kevin are.

characters.name: Gloria Akalitus
characters.description: Gloria AkalitusWork / AboutStatusAliveOccupationHospital Administrator (previously)Trained Nurse (previously)GenderFemaleProtrayed byAnna Deavere SmithSeasons1-7Gloria Akalitusis the by-the-book Administrator forAll Saints Hospital. She often serves as comic relief. She is portrayed byAnna Deveare Smith. Gloria is snappy, hardworking, strict, and fair. She mediates conflicts between staff, patients, and third parties. She keeps the hospital together and running smoothly. A sharp and attuned (or so she thinks) former nurse with a thirty year career at All Saints, there's not a move in the repertoire that she hasn't seen. Gloria is introduced in Season 1 as the "troll" who is looking forNurse Jackie. Gloria is aware Jackie bends the rules, but she does not suspect Jackie of stealing pain pills. She relies heavily on Jackie’s expertise and has her trainZoey. Gloria is pleased to useCoopin hospital publicity. Although Gloria can seem cold, rude and unsympathetic, she spends a day on the floor and the staff agree she is still a great nurse.

characters.name: Grace Peyton
characters.description: Grace PeytonPortrayed ByRuby JerinsBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationCollege StudentFamilyJackie Peyton(mother)Kevin Peyton(father)Fiona Peyton(sister)Tunie Peyton(aunt)Physical DescriptionGenderFemaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorBlueGrace Peytonis the oldest daughter ofJackieandKevin Peyton, the older sister ofFiona Peytonand the niece ofTunie Peyton. She is portrayed by Ruby Jerins. Kevin Peyton(father)Fiona Peyton(sister)Tunie Peyton(aunt) The elder of Jackie's two daughters, Grace Peyton was diagnosed at a young age with generalized anxiety disorder. Teachers flagged Grace's anxiety when they found Grace drawing meticulously similar pictures of her family - devoid of colour, a sun or happiness. Grace struggles when Jackie has to go to work, saying she "wishes the hospital would burn down" (S1 EP8). In the early seasons Grace is highly strung and very concerned with germs/plagues/bacteria. She is seen watching documentaries that aren't appropriate for her age, staying up all night and stressing. This is seen just before her diagnosis of anxiety. Grace can be feisty in her personality, challenging both her parents. Grace is often judgmental when it comes to Jackie's drug addiction. An intelligent girl who makes good grades in school, she also has a rebellious side. This stems from her resentment toward Jackie for her addiction, and resentment toward both parents for their divorce, which causes upheaval in her life. Toward the end of the series, she softens toward Jackie, and shows a sensitive understanding of Jackie's struggle with addiction.

characters.name: Ike Prentiss
characters.description: Ike PrentissPortayed ByMorris ChestnutBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationTrauma surgeonChief of Emergency MedicineRelationshipsZoey Barkow(ex-girlfriend)Physcial DescriptionGenderMale Dr. Ike Prentissis an emergency medicine doctor inSeason 5ofNurse Jackie. Ike is a highly experienced army medic who is extremely efficient in making quick diagnoses that other doctors miss. Ike is played by Morris Chestnut. Ike enters season 5, he is late and entering the ER at All Saints before being intercepted byJackie Peyton. Jackie thinks he is a random person entering the ER, Ike is frosty as he can see a lady walking into the ER in front of him who is having a myocardial infarction (MI). He tells Jackie to get out of his way so he can do his job. Dr. Prentiss is widely known for his serious and direct demeanor. He is Solemn and no-nonsense: He maintains a focused, professional attitude, especially in high-pressure situations. He is an highly experienced doctor with years of practice in both military and civilian medicine have made him confident and capable during medical emergencies. He is shown to be a disorganized individual despite his medical competence. He struggles with paperwork, administrative duties, and general organization. Zoey helps him organize his office and paperwork due to this. He is also a straightforward communicator: He speaks bluntly about any issues he faces in the workplace, which is shown when he confronts Akalitis on the multiple broken or outdated technology in All Saints or when he expresses his concerns about Dr. Roman’s incompetence. He also shows difficulties in being empathetic and relatable when interacting with patients, due to his serious demeanor. This is shown when he informs the police officers about the cop who was shot, using medical terminology an a robotic tone. Zoey interrupts and takes his clipboard prompting him to use more understandable language and be warmer with the officers. This shows he’s capable of taking advice and criticism and changing for the better.

characters.name: Jackie Peyton
characters.description: Jackie PeytonPortayed ByEdie FalcoBiographical InformationStatusUnknownOccupationER Nurse, Drug Dealer (former),Elder Nurse (former)ColleaguesZoey Barkow(close friend, colleague, roommate)Eleanor O'Hara(best friend, ex-colleague)Fitch Cooper(colleague)Gloria Akalitus(ex-friend, boss)Carrie Roman(friend, colleague)Thor Lundgren(friend, colleague)Ike Prentiss(ex-colleague)Mohammed De La Cruz(close friend, ex-colleague)Lenny (ex-colleague)Sam (ex-addict, colleague)Bernard Prince(close friend, ex-colleague)Kelly Slater(ex-friend, ex-colleague, drug dealer)Johanes Karlsen(ex-friend, owner of All Saints)Barry Wolfe(friend, lawyer)Antoinette (ex-sponsor, enemy)Helen (Nancy Wood) (friend, deceased)✝Charlie Cruz(close friend, deceased)✝Bill (ex-drug dealer, deceased)✝ChildrenGrace Peyton(daughter)Fiona Peyton(daughter)RelationshipsEddie Walzer(fiancé)Kevin Peyton(ex-husband)Mike Cruz(close friend, ex-lover, ex-boss)Gabe (ex-lover, drug dealer)Frank Verelli(ex-lover)Physcial DescriptionGenderFemaleHair ColorBlondeEye ColorBlueJacqueline Peytonwas an emergency room nurse at All Saints Hospital in New York City. She andKevinhave two daughters:GraceandFiona Peyton. Eleanor O'Hara(best friend, ex-colleague)Fitch Cooper(colleague)Gloria Akalitus(ex-friend, boss)Carrie Roman(friend, colleague)Thor Lundgren(friend, colleague)Ike Prentiss(ex-colleague)Mohammed De La Cruz(close friend, ex-colleague)Lenny (ex-colleague)Sam (ex-addict, colleague)Bernard Prince(close friend, ex-colleague)Kelly Slater(ex-friend, ex-colleague, drug dealer)Johanes Karlsen(ex-friend, owner of All Saints)Barry Wolfe(friend, lawyer)Antoinette (ex-sponsor, enemy)Helen (Nancy Wood) (friend, deceased)✝Charlie Cruz(close friend, deceased)✝Bill (ex-drug dealer, deceased)✝ Fiona Peyton(daughter) Jackie is blunt, funny, sarcastic, adaptive, and take her job seriously. However -when it comes to her drug addiction- she can be manipulative, uncompassionate, dishonest, desperate and deniable. When it comes to her family, she is actually a decent mother, but can let them down in serious ways (usually without them knowing). Jackie balances being a nurse, wife, mother, adulteress/cuckqueen and drug addict over the entire course of the series, which explores how this kind of unethical life is bound to collapse.

characters.name: Kelly Slater
characters.description: Travel R.N wins over his colleagues with tales of his exploits in Haiti - butJackieis far from impressed. and gets exposed later on. Has worked at Bellevue Hospital, and All Saint's Hospital in NYC. Played By: Gbenga Akinnagbe

characters.name: Kevin Peyton
characters.description: Kevin PeytonPortayed ByDominic FumusaBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationBar Owner of Red OwlChildrenGrace Peyton(daughter)Fiona Peyton(daughter)Unnamed child (with Mia)RelationshipsJackie Peyton(ex-wife, enemy)Mia Peyton(wife)Jenny Fling(ex-lover)Physcial DescriptionGenderMaleHair ColorDark BrownEye ColorBrownKevin Peytonis the ex-husband ofJackie Peytonand the father ofGraceandFiona Peyton. He is portrayed by Dominic Fumusa. Fiona Peyton(daughter)Unnamed child (with Mia) Mia Peyton(wife)Jenny Fling(ex-lover) Kevin is a naive person who is initially loving, supportive, and accommodating. The series heavily focuses on Jackie's career (obviously, as the protagonist) but we see Kevin is also significant, while also being a character whose naivety lends itself to ignorance about what is really going on. Kevin provides the primary, stable, consistent caregiver role to Grace and Fi. He is consistently there for any panic attack, appointment or sports day. Jackie - as an addict - takes advantage of his generosity, consistently minimizing, and manipulating him, while continuing to profess her love for him and their children. This presents an issue when dealing with her love for her husband and her (possible) love for Eddie - as she tells Dr. O'Hara, "It's possible to love more than one person at once." Eventually, after discovering about Eddie, the lies turn to bitterness for Kevin. We already see that Kevin can become very angry and struggle with interpersonal conflict - as we see during the holiday where he walks off from his family in the car. Unfortunately as Kevin's life unravels, he becomes more aggressive and hostile, leading him to question his marriage, his relationships with people surrounding his universe with Jackie, and even his relationships with his children. He starts by paying for Fiona to go to the same private school as Grace, as well as changing both girls files to state he is theonlyemergency contact.

He starts by paying for Fiona to go to the same private school as Grace, as well as changing both girls files to state he is theonlyemergency contact.
characters.personality_section: Kevin is a naive person who is initially loving, supportive, and accommodating. The series heavily focuses on Jackie's career (obviously, as the protagonist) but we see Kevin is also significant, while also being a character whose naivety lends itself to ignorance about what is really going on. Kevin provides the primary, stable, consistent caregiver role to Grace and Fi. He is consistently there for any panic attack, appointment or sports day. Jackie - as an addict - takes advantage of his generosity, consistently minimizing, and manipulating him, while continuing to profess her love for him and their children. This presents an issue when dealing with her love for her husband and her (possible) love for Eddie - as she tells Dr. O'Hara, "It's possible to love more than one person at once." Eventually, after discovering about Eddie, the lies turn to bitterness for Kevin. We already see that Kevin can become very angry and struggle with interpersonal conflict - as we see during the holiday where he walks off from his family in the car. Unfortunately as Kevin's life unravels, he becomes more aggressive and hostile, leading him to question his marriage, his relationships with people surrounding his universe with Jackie, and even his relationships with his children. He starts by paying for Fiona to go to the same private school as Grace, as well as changing both girls files to state he is theonlyemergency contact.

characters.name: Mike Cruz
characters.description: Mike CruzWork / AboutStatusAliveOccupationHospital Administrator/Director of The ERGenderMaleSeasons4-5Known RelationsFamilyCharlie Cruz(son)Dr. Miguel "Mike" Cruzjoins All Saints as chief administrator in Season Four when the companyQuantum Baybuys out the hospital. Bobby Cannavale plays Dr. Mike. (WARNING:Spoilers) He has been divorced multiple times, and has full custody of his son. He suffers from panic attacks, which he insists is asthma. He tries to help his son with his drug addiction by bringing him to rehab a total of five times. Officious and demanding, he is not well liked in the ER, but occasionally he shows some sensitivity to his staff. He frequently butts heads with other members of the staff, including Jackie, who challenges his authority and threatens him because of her extraordinary expertise. In mid-season, a significant "reveal" occurs when we learn that Dr. Mike is the father of Jackie’s friend, eighteen year-old, Charlie, from rehab. Charlie makes his father promise not to fire Jackie. The next day, in a heavy-handed act of asserting his administrative power, he fires Gloria and Eddie, for enabling Jackie's drug addiction, while honoring his promise to his son. Later, after suffering from a cardiac incident he discovers that Jackie has hired seven temporary nurses which infuriates Cruz. He provokes Jackie in a public scene and then fires Jackie for insubordination. Shortly after, when Jackie returns to the hospital for the birth of O’Hara’s son, Cruz intercepts Jackie and attempts to force her to leave just as Charlie is brought into the ER. Charlie has overdosed which leaves Mike devastated. In a state of panic, he asks for Jackie's help. They try to revive Charlie but he eventually succumbs. Jackie leaves Cruz to mourn privately which ends the fourth season. We see Mike Cruz again at the beginning of season five after it becomes known that Jackie has been leaving voicemails on Charlie’s old number. He calls Jackie while she is on a date and asks to see her. They go back to his apartment where he confesses that he is having a hard time with his son’s death. Jackie holds him as he cries. They then kiss and have sex. Jackie gets a phone call and has to leave abruptly. The next day he returns to the hospital for the exit interview he’s been putting off. He confesses to Jackie that while he had to come back for his exit interview he also came back to see her. He tells her that he thinks they are more than a one time thing. Later, Jackie returns to his apartment. When he answers the door, she kisses him. After they break apart he asks her if that was goodbye. She says yes and leaves to return to the man she is dating at the time.

characters.name: Mohammed De La Cruz
characters.description: Mohammed De La CruzWork / AboutStatusUnknownOccupationER NurseGenderMaleSeasons1Mohammed "Mo-Mo" De La Cruz, played by actor Haaz Sleiman, is a former emergency room nurse at All Saints Hospital in New York City. Momo wasn't continued past S2 due to Jackie being close with O'Hara. Justice for Momo!

characters.name: Sam
characters.description: SamWork / AboutStatusUnknownOccupationER NurseGenderMaleSeasons1-4Sam (last name unknown)is a nurse. Initially an agency nurse at the All Saints Emergency Room, he later became a regular member of the team. He is portrayed by Arjun Gupta. Sam is smart, reasonable, and relaxed. He used to work at Bellvue. He speaks Farsi and Armenian. He is a recovering addict, dedicated to his recovery although he slips up at times. This spooks Jackie as it brings their social circles closer into line than she would like. Like other new nurses, Sam clocks Jackie’s addiction early on. Sam does not let Coop push him around. In Season Two, he punches Coop in the face.

characters.name: Sarah Khouri
characters.description: Sarah Khouriis a popular Journalist who was the girlfriend ofEleanor O'Hara. She is portrayed by Julia Ormond. Sarah is a very prominent and popular journalist. She's posted in Washington at the time of season two but finds it boring compared to the intense work she's done all over the world. Sarah is a very promiscuous person, she is said to have "a girlfriend in every port/country". Jackie discovers that Sarah is cheating on O'Hara after helping Sarah treat a brown recluse spider bite.

characters.name: Tunie Peyton
characters.description: Tunie PeytonWork / AboutGenderFemaleSeasons3Known RelationsFamilyKevin Peyton(brother)Grace Peyton(niece)Fiona Peyton(niece)Tunie Peytonis the younger sister ofKevin Peyton, sister-in law ofJackie Peytonand aunt toGraceandFiona Peyton. She is portrayed by Jaime Alexander. Tunie is seen to be very young in spirit, we are introduced after a disagreement betweenKevin PeytonandJackie Peyton. Fiona and Grace go to hang out with Tunie, while Kevin andEleanor O'Harastage a potential intervention for Jackie. Tunie seems to pick poor choices in the boyfriends she dates, as the pilot she is dating breaks up with her. We see Tuni behaving more like a teenager than an adult as she drinks after the break up and ends up crashing at the Peyton Household.
